# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Follow `AGENTS.md` as the primary repository guidance.

For Blade and UI work:

- Reuse existing `x-daisy::layout.*`, `x-daisy::ui.*`, and `x-daisy::templates.*` aliases before creating new Blade files.
- Check `resources/boost/skills/daisy-kit-component-reuse/references/component-catalog.md` first.
- Prefer published vendor overrides over copied package markup when the change is small.
- Treat Daisy Kit as the authoritative reusable UI layer for host applications.
